No matter what you do, there's a Surface to help you do it
Windows 10 support has ended
Get up to $900 cash back for your eligible trade-in
Your PC has an OS that no longer receives free security updates, feature updates, or technical support. Buy Surface for Business, Copilot+ PCs and get extra cash back when you trade in an eligible device.

Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch (8th Edition) ​| Intel 

From $ • • • • • •

Handle demanding apps with fast performance and built-in security powered by the latest Intel® processors. Plus, an optional privacy screen on select 13.8-inch devices.3,5

Processor: Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor 335 (Series 3), Intel® Core™ Ultra 7 processor 366H (Series 3), or Intel® Core™ Ultra X7 processor 368H (Series 3)
Screen size: 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow display
Weight: 13.8-inch: 2.97 lb (1.35 kg), 13.8-inch with integrated privacy screen: 3 lb (1.36 kg), 15-inch: 3.67 lb (1.67 kg)
Storage: Removable solid-state drive (Gen 4) 256 GB, 512 GB, or 1 TB
Memory: 16 GB, 32 GB, or 64 GB (LPDDR5x RAM)
Network and connectivity: Wi-Fi only models
Operating System: Windows 11 Pro

Storage: Removable solid-state drive (Gen 4 SSD) 256 GB, 512 GB, or 1 TB
Memory: 16 GB or 32 GB (LPDDR5x RAM)
Network and connectivity: Wi-Fi only and Wi-Fi + 5G models
Operating System: Windows 11 Pro

    Business customers get more from Surface

    Trade in used devices for cash

    Convert your used laptops, desktops, and other devices to cash.² Microsoft trade-ins are powered by Teladvance. For trade-ins of 20 or more, Teladvance offers customized shipping and handling.
    Get a trade-in value

    Windows 11 Pro

    Surface for Business devices include Windows 11 Pro. Stay productive and focused with a more intuitive and personalized user experience, plus powerful protections like enhanced phishing safeguards and passwordless security.
    Compare Windows 11

    Microsoft 365 for Business

    This integrated solution brings together the best-in-class productivity of Microsoft 365 with advanced security and device-management capabilities to help safeguard your business.1
    See plans and pricing

      

    Next level security

    Better protection for your small business.
    Watch the video

    Empower Productivity

    Learn how Surface for Business devices enable flexibility, hybrid work, and collaboration.
    Watch the video

    Raising the bar on collaboration

    "Technology defines the employee experience. I can’t say enough about what our teams accomplish through the connected collaboration they enjoy with Microsoft solutions." - J. Trinidad (Trini) Garibay: Chief Executive Officer and Cofounder (Elite Construction + Development)
    Watch the customer video

                                                                                                                                                                           

    Frequently asked questions

    |

    • As of October 14, 2025, PCs running Windows 10 will still function, but Microsoft will no longer provide the following:

      • Technical support
      • Feature updates
      • Free security updates or fixes
         

      While your Windows PC will continue to function, it will be at greater risk for viruses and malware when Windows 10 reaches end of support. We recommend you transition to a version of Windows that is still supported. If your existing device cannot run Windows 11 Pro, a new business PC that can run Windows 11 Pro makes for an easy transition and great experience.

    • No. Your PC will continue to work, but support for Windows 10 Pro is discontinued. After October 14, 2025, your Windows 10 PC will no longer receive free security updates and Microsoft will no longer provide Windows 10 Pro technical support. Shop now for a Surface for Business PC with Windows 11 Pro.

    • For small business needs, consider the Surface Laptop for Business 7th Edition, Copilot+ PC. It features AI-powered tools, Snapdragon X Plus or X Elite processors, up to 1 TB storage, and a 13.8- or 15-inch PixelSense Flow™ Display. Another excellent option is the Surface Laptop 6 for Business with Intel® Core™ Ultra processors, AI-driven tools, enhanced security, long battery life, and Windows 11 Pro, available in 13.5- and 15-inch models.

    • Microsoft Surface lineup offers versatile devices that can function as both tablets and laptops. Models like Surface Pro and Surface Go are 2-in-1 devices with detachable keyboards, allowing them to switch between tablet and laptop modes. Meanwhile, the Surface Laptop series is designed as traditional laptops with touchscreens. 

    • Microsoft Surface devices for business do not come with Office pre-installed. However, you can purchase Microsoft 365 separately, which includes Office apps like Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. Microsoft 365 offers various plans tailored to small businesses, providing additional features such as cloud storage and collaboration tools. 

    • The best Surface Pro for businesses would be the Surface Pro for Business 11th Edition, Copilot+ PC. This AI-powered 2-in-1 tablet and laptop runs Windows 11 Pro and has up to 1 TB of storage. It's lightweight, versatile, and has a powerful Snapdragon X Plus or Snapdragon X Elite Processor.  

    • The main differences between Surface Pro and Surface Laptop for Business are their form factors and use cases. Surface Pro is a 2-in-1 device, offering tablet portability with a detachable keyboard, making it ideal for flexible, mobile work. Surface Laptop, on the other hand, is a traditional laptop with a more robust build, offering larger screens and longer battery life for those needing consistent laptop power. Both run Windows 11 Pro. 

    • Surface for Business devices come with a standard hardware warranty, which includes one year of coverage for defects and malfunctions. You can also opt for extended warranty options like Microsoft Extended Hardware Service, offering up to three years of protection, and Microsoft Complete for Business, which covers accidental damage for the same duration, ensuring peace of mind for your small business 

    • The Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC is a great choice. This 2-in-1 tablet features AI tools, Windows 11, up to 1 TB storage, and Snapdragon X Plus or X Elite processors. Another great option is the Surface Pro 10 for Business. Its durable, lightweight design is perfect for remote work, and its compatibility with essential business software like QuickBooks enhances productivity.  

    • Yes, the Microsoft Surface Laptop lineup is great for businesses, especially small ones. They offer a sleek design, long battery life, and powerful performance for everyday business tasks. With enterprise-grade security, built-in Windows 11 Pro, and compatibility with business software, any Surface Laptop provides a reliable and secure environment for managing operations, whether you're in the office or on the go. 

    • The primary difference between Surface Pro or Laptop for Business and Consumer models is in their features and focus. Business models offer enhanced security (like Windows 11 Pro), greater processing power, more storage options, and enterprise-grade features such as remote management and productivity tools. They are built for durability and performance in professional environments. Consumer models, in contrast, are designed for everyday use, with a focus on affordability and entertainment features. 

    • Using a Surface for Business tablet can significantly benefit a small business by enhancing productivity and flexibility. These devices offer powerful performance with the latest Intel® Core™ and Snapdragon X Plus and Elite processors, all-day battery life, and built-in security features. The 2-in-1 design allows for seamless transitions between tablet and laptop modes, making it easier to work from anywhere. 

    • Absolutely! Microsoft Surface Pro for Business is designed with business users in mind. It offers the flexibility of a tablet with the power of a laptop, making it ideal for various business tasks. With features like Windows 11 Pro, robust security, and AI-driven tools, it helps streamline daily operations. Its lightweight, portable design ensures you can work efficiently from anywhere. 

    • Yes, Microsoft offers financing options for Surface for Business devices through our Business Financing program. This program offers flexible payment options for Surface laptops, computers, and accessories.

    • Surface Go for Business offers several benefits for small businesses: 

      • Portability: Weighing only 1.15 lbs., it’s easy to carry around. 

      • Performance: Powered by an Intel® Processor N200, it ensures smooth operation. 

      • Versatility: Functions as both a laptop and a tablet. 

      • Security: Built-in security features and Windows 11 Pro for enhanced protection. 

    Why shop at Microsoft Store for your business

    Consider us your go-to specialists for Microsoft products and services. Whether you’re a company of three or 300, our product experts can help you find the right Microsoft devices, software, and resources to meet your goals and grow your business.
    Learn more

    Do more and save with your free work account​

    Get easy access to exclusive business discounts and simplified account management with a shopping experience built for business.​
    Learn more

    Fast shipping and free returns

    Enjoy free 2-3 day shipping with no minimum purchase required. Plus, get free 60-day returns on almost any physical product.
    Some exclusions apply.*
    See shipping details Learn about returns

    60-day price protection

    Buy now, enjoy price protection for 60 days from your delivery date. If we drop the price of a select physical product, contact us and we’ll honor a one-time price adjustment.
    ﻿﻿﻿﻿Exclusions apply.*
    Learn more about price protection

    Work worry-free with extended coverage

    Accidents happen but business must go on. Avoid unplanned setbacks and expenses, with up to 4 years coverage when you purchase one of our Microsoft protection plans.
    Learn about protection plans
    [1] Sold separately.
    • [2] Available only through the Microsoft online store in the United States (including Puerto Rico). Offer valid for reimbursements after trade in of qualifying devices (PC, laptop, mobile phone, tablet, video game console). To be eligible for trade in, you must own the qualifying device, device must power on, battery must hold charge and not be required to be plugged in to operate, and be in fully functional, working condition without broken/missing components, cracked display/housing, liquid damage, modification(s) or have device warranty seal broken. Device cannot be password protected, and must include original chargers/accessories, and must contain hard drive. Customer must mail in the qualifying trade-in device to be eligible for the reimbursements. All trade-ins are final. Cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or gift cards, or credit towards other devices or products. May not be combined with other offers. Price discount does not include taxes, shipping, or other fees. Void where prohibited or restricted by law. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time. Other exclusions and limits may apply.
    • [3] Based on local video playback test. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, ambient lighting, and other factors. See Surface battery testing and estimated performance - Microsoft Support.
    • [4] 5G not available in all areas. Compatibility and performance depend on carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing.
    • [5] ePrivacy reader option available on select 13.8-inch configurations at additional cost.
    • *Based on local video playback test. Battery life varies significantly based on usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings, and other factors. See Surface Battery Performance for details.
    • Surface for Business: Take your office to new levels of creativity and productivity with Microsoft Surface business products. Microsoft Surface business products allow your team to create and collaborate in all new ways that will help you drive your business further into the future.

      Microsoft Surface business products are especially designed to fit into the modern workplace. From light and agile devices that let you work independently almost anywhere, to devices that allow you to make the most of your virtual meetings, Surface has a solution designed for your needs. Plus, our full line of Surface accessories makes it easy to personalize your setup to match your work style. With the creative tools, keyboards, docks, mice, adapters, and chargers available, you're empowered to work the way your lifestyle demands without making any compromises.

      If you're interested in using Surface in your workplace, be sure to explore the Microsoft Surface Business All Access program. It allows you to outfit your whole team with Surface products for a low monthly fee and 0% APR. Plus, with the optional Business and Developer Software Solutions, you can bundle Microsoft 365, or Visual Studio with your devices. Get everyone on the same devices with the same software, and you'll be setting yourself up for success.

      Discover the advantages of Microsoft Surface business products today, and boldly lead your team into a brighter tomorrow. Imagine what you could accomplish with a set of powerful, adaptable, and compact tools at your disposal.

    *See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

    Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

    Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

    Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying physical consumer products and Surface for Business devices made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Price adjustments for Surface for Business devices can be made via credit card for purchases made on microsoft.com website only.

    Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally, ROG Xbox Ally X, Surface for Business devices and accessories, and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. ​

    Both price adjustments: Price adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support and provide any information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

    Why shop at Microsoft Store for your business

    Consider us your go-to specialists for Microsoft products and services. Whether you’re a company of three or 300, our product experts can help you find the right Microsoft devices, software, and resources to meet your goals and grow your business.
    Learn more

    Do more and save with your free work account​

    Get easy access to exclusive business discounts and simplified account management with a shopping experience built for business.​
    Manage your account

    Fast shipping and free returns​

    Enjoy free 2-3 day shipping with no minimum purchase required. Plus, get free 60-day returns on almost any physical product.
    ﻿﻿﻿﻿Some exclusions apply.
    See shipping details Learn about returns

    60-day price protection​

    Buy now, enjoy price protection for 60 days from your delivery date. If we drop the price of a select physical product, contact us and we’ll honor a one-time price adjustment. Exclusions apply.
    Learn about price protection

    Work worry-free with extended coverage​

    Accidents happen but business must go on. Avoid unplanned setbacks and expenses, with up to 4 years coverage when you purchase one of our Microsoft protection plans.​
    Learn about protection plans
    *Based on local video playback test. Battery life varies significantly based on usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings, and other factors. See Surface Battery Performance for details.
    • Surface for Business: Take your office to new levels of creativity and productivity with Microsoft Surface business products. Microsoft Surface business products allow your team to create and collaborate in all new ways that will help you drive your business further into the future.

      Microsoft Surface business products are especially designed to fit into the modern workplace. From light and agile devices that let you work independently almost anywhere, to devices that allow you to make the most of your virtual meetings, Surface has a solution designed for your needs. Plus, our full line of Surface accessories makes it easy to personalize your setup to match your work style. With the creative tools, keyboards, docks, mice, adapters, and chargers available, you're empowered to work the way your lifestyle demands without making any compromises.

      If you're interested in using Surface in your workplace, be sure to explore the Microsoft Surface Business All Access program. It allows you to outfit your whole team with Surface products for a low monthly fee and 0% APR. Plus, with the optional Business and Developer Software Solutions, you can bundle Microsoft 365, or Visual Studio with your devices. Get everyone on the same devices with the same software, and you'll be setting yourself up for success.

      Discover the advantages of Microsoft Surface business products today, and boldly lead your team into a brighter tomorrow. Imagine what you could accomplish with a set of powerful, adaptable, and compact tools at your disposal.

    Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

    Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

    Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying physical consumer products and Surface for Business devices made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Price adjustments for Surface for Business devices can be made via credit card for purchases made on icrosoft.com website only.​

    Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally, ROG Xbox Ally X, Surface for Business devices and accessories, and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. ​

    Both price adjustments: Price adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support and provide any information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

    See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.
